Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)

Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の教育者}} {{see also|Category:江戸幕府の学校・研究機関}} {{see also|Category:江戸時代の教育機関別の人物}} {{デフォルトソート:18 にほん きよういくしや}} {{citation needed|18 にほん きよういくしや}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育者}} {{translated page|ja|18世紀日本の教育者|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育者|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育者|version=86777740}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の教育者]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:18th century Japanese educators]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Shoheizaka Academy]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:18th Century Education in Japan]] [[Category:18th-century educators]] [[Category:18th-century Japanese people by occupation]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Education in Japan in the Edo period]] [[Category:Japanese educators by century]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:questionable possibly untranslated categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の教育者}} {{see also|Category:江戸幕府の学校・研究機関}} {{see also|Category:江戸時代の教育機関別の人物}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育者}} {{translated page|ja|18世紀日本の教育者|2=Category:18世紀日本の教育者|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:18世紀日本の教育者|version=86777740}} <!--interwikis--> [[ja:Category:18世紀日本の教育者]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTCategory:18th century Japanese educators]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Shoheizaka Academy]] [[Category:18th Century Education in Japan]] [[Category:18th-century educators]] [[Category:18th-century Japanese people by occupation]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Education in Japan in the Edo period]] [[Category:Japanese educators by century]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:questionable possibly untranslated categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]]
